Features you will love.

Everything a solo founder needs to stay on top of every inbox

Everything a solo founder needs to stay on top of every inbox

Every mailbox connects with AES-256 encryption, and only you ever see your messages. Your passwords stay encrypted at rest, always.

Every mailbox connects with AES-256 encryption, and only you ever see your messages. Your passwords stay encrypted at rest, always.

Never miss a client reply. Get notified the moment any inbox receives mail, so you are always in the loop.

Testimonials

Why people

love Maily.

  • I can’t imagine running my day without it. The notifications are instant, and the categorization makes life much easier. A game-changer for staying organized!

    Samantha Collins

  • The best productivity tool I’ve used. It keeps my team on track and ensures I never miss an important message. Simple yet powerful

    David Nguyen

  • Finally, a solution that feels intuitive and just works. I love the AI-tagging system—it keeps everything in order with zero effort from me

    Emily Johnson

  • Connect Gmail, Outlook, and custom-domain mailboxes, and see every message from every project in one clutter-free dashboard.
